item.title: Wuque WS POM+ Linear Switches
item.dc:creator: Mr. Mackay
item.content:encoded:
Reloaded. Rewired. Reinvented.

Sep 5th 2021 marks the date when the low-profile mechanical keyboard was forever changed by the release of NuPhy Air75. Fast forward 2 years, we are excited to share that a new Air75 with lightning fast connection and light weight, one not just built for you, but also put you in charge, is now ready.

New Arrivals

Bask in the fresh Air ‘Less is more’ has been our mantra when it comes to designing

Keycaps

A double-shot keycap
at half the thickness Double-shot PBT keycaps are finally coming to Air75!

item.title: Home Keyboards
item.dc:creator: Mr. Mackay
item.content:encoded:
Build your personal greatest keyboard.

High-quality mechanical keyboards, switches, keyboards and accessories from well-known manufacturers.

Shop now

New Arrivals

GMK SA profile keycaps

Keycaps provide top-notch durability and a great feel for your typing.

Buy now

Coming Soon

NuPhy Gem80

The text for this banner, which will be replaced by some other one.

Pre-order Now

New Arrivals

Gateron KS-9 3.0

The text for this banner, which will be replaced by some other one.

Explore Switches

Get 15% your first purchase!

Free delivery on orders over $59,99

Get 15% your first purchase!

Free delivery on orders over $59,99

Keyboards

View all

Profitable offers. Switches, keycaps, custom assemblies create your perfect build.

Keyboard

Lofree Block

$169.00

This design not only complements any workspace but also enhances typing efficiency, making the Block a stylish yet functional choice for minimalism users.

Explore

Keycaps

Limited Edition

Melgeek Pixel 16bit

$29.99

Designed with a gaming pixel style, each key tells a story of classic adventures and pixelated triumphs. Immerse yourself in the golden era of gaming as you level up your typing experience.

Buy Now

Switches

Wuque WS POM+

$7.20

Explore

Switches

View all

Keycaps

View all

Accessories

View all

Join our community, discuss, share, and be the first to learn about new products and sales.

Will be used in accordance with our Privacy Policy

item.title: Wishlist
item.dc:creator: Mr. Mackay
item.content:encoded: <!-- wp:shortcode --> [woodmart_wishlist] <!-- /wp:shortcode -->

item.title: About Us
item.dc:creator: Mr. Mackay
item.content:encoded:
Welcome to WoodMart, your premier destination for high-quality mechanical keyboards, switches, and keycaps. Whether you are a gamer, a programmer, or a typing aficionado, WoodMart offers a wide range of options to elevate your setup.

Comfort in every click! 🙌

Comfort in every click! 🙌

Comfort in every click! 🙌

Comfort in every click! 🙌

Components from trusted manufacturers

Our selection of mechanical keyboards, switches, and keycaps comes from leading brands, ensuring you receive only for the best.

Explore

Personalized advice and support

Our team is passionate about the products we offer and is always ready to assist you with tailored recommendations and guidance.

Contact us

The ultimate typing experience

Whether you're a gamer, programmer, or typing enthusiast, our premium products offer unmatched comfort, precision, and durability.

To reviews

Frequently asked questions

What are the benefits of using a mechanical keyboard over a membrane keyboard?

A seemingly elegant design can quickly begin to bloat with unexpected content or break under the weight of actual activity. Fake data can ensure a nice looking layout but it doesn’t reflect what a living, breathing application must endure. Real data does.

How do I choose the right switch for my mechanical keyboard?

Websites in professional use templating systems. Commercial publishing platforms and content management systems ensure that you can show different text, different data using the same template. When it’s about controlling hundreds of articles, product pages for web shops.

Can I customize my mechanical keyboard?

If the contents of the parcel are suspicious to customs officers (for example, many identical goods), it may be further checked. Keep the product in its original packaging along with all documents confirming the purchase and refund. You will need this for further communication with the seller and the payment system.

What is the difference between RGB and non-RGB mechanical keyboards?

Check the email you received after placing your order. It should contain information about the status of your order and the expected delivery date. Keep the product in its original packaging along with all documents confirming the purchase and refund. You will need this for further communication with the seller and the payment system.

How do I clean and maintain my mechanical keyboard?

Websites in professional use templating systems. Commercial publishing platforms and content management systems ensure that you can show different text, different data using the same template. When it’s about controlling hundreds of articles, product pages for web shops.

item.title: Contact Us
item.dc:creator: Mr. Mackay
item.content:encoded:
Get in touch

Contact us for any questions related to your order, personalized advice and support

wp:postmeta.wp:meta_value: Thank you, your sign-up request was successful! Please check your email inbox to confirm.
Please provide a valid email address.
Please fill in the required fields.
Given email address is already subscribed, thank you!
Oops. Something went wrong. Please try again later.
Given email address is not subscribed.
Please select at least one list.
Thank you, your records have been updated!
Your submission was marked as spam.

item.title: Contact form Keyboards
item.dc:creator: Mr. Mackay
item.content:encoded:
[text* First name placeholder ="First name"]
[text* Last name placeholder ="Email" ]
[text* Email placeholder ="Email" ]
[textarea your-message placeholder ="Your Message"]
[submit class:btn class:btn-color-primary"Send Message"]
1 [_site_title] "[your-subject]" [_site_title] [_site_admin_email] From: [your-name] [your-email] Subject: [your-subject] Message Body: [your-message] -- This is a notification that a contact form was submitted on your website ([_site_title] [_site_url]). Reply-To: [your-email] 1 1 [_site_title] "[your-subject]" [_site_title] [your-email] Message Body: [your-message] -- This email is a receipt for your contact form submission on our website ([_site_title] [_site_url]) in which your email address was used. If that was not you, please ignore this message. Reply-To: [_site_admin_email] 1 1 Thank you for your message. It has been sent. There was an error trying to send your message. Please try again later. One or more fields have an error. Please check and try again. There was an error trying to send your message. Please try again later. You must accept the terms and conditions before sending your message. Please fill out this field. This field has a too long input. This field has a too short input. There was an unknown error uploading the file. You are not allowed to upload files of this type. The uploaded file is too large. There was an error uploading the file. Please enter a date in YYYY-MM-DD format. This field has a too early date. This field has a too late date. Please enter a number. This field has a too small number. This field has a too large number. The answer to the quiz is incorrect. Please enter an email address. Please enter a URL. Please enter a telephone number.

wp:postmeta.wp:meta_value:
[text* First name placeholder ="First name"]
[text* Last name placeholder ="Email" ]
[text* Email placeholder ="Email" ]
[textarea your-message placeholder ="Your Message"]
[submit class:btn class:btn-color-primary"Send Message"]

a:9:{s:6:"active";b:0;s:7:"subject";s:30:"[_site_title] "[your-subject]"";s:6:"sender";s:42:"[_site_title] <wordpress@dummy.xtemos.com>";s:9:"recipient";s:12:"[your-email]";s:4:"body";s:220:"Message Body: [your-message]
-- This email is a receipt for your contact form submission on our website ([_site_title] [_site_url]) in which your email address was used. If that was not you, please ignore this message.";s:18:"additional_headers";s:29:"Reply-To: [_site_admin_email]";s:11:"attachments";s:0:"";s:8:"use_html";b:1;s:13:"exclude_blank";b:1;}

a:22:{s:12:"mail_sent_ok";s:45:"Thank you for your message. It has been sent.";s:12:"mail_sent_ng";s:71:"There was an error trying to send your message. Please try again later.";s:16:"validation_error";s:61:"One or more fields have an error. Please check and try again.";s:4:"spam";s:71:"There was an error trying to send your message. Please try again later.";s:12:"accept_terms";s:69:"You must accept the terms and conditions before sending your message.";s:16:"invalid_required";s:27:"Please fill out this field.";s:16:"invalid_too_long";s:32:"This field has a too long input.";s:17:"invalid_too_short";s:33:"This field has a too short input.";s:13:"upload_failed";s:46:"There was an unknown error uploading the file.";s:24:"upload_file_type_invalid";s:49:"You are not allowed to upload files of this type.";s:21:"upload_file_too_large";s:31:"The uploaded file is too large.";s:23:"upload_failed_php_error";s:38:"There was an error uploading the file.";s:12:"invalid_date";s:41:"Please enter a date in YYYY-MM-DD format.";s:14:"date_too_early";s:32:"This field has a too early date.";s:13:"date_too_late";s:31:"This field has a too late date.";s:14:"invalid_number";s:22:"Please enter a number.";s:16:"number_too_small";s:34:"This field has a too small number.";s:16:"number_too_large";s:34:"This field has a too large number.";s:23:"quiz_answer_not_correct";s:36:"The answer to the quiz is incorrect.";s:13:"invalid_email";s:30:"Please enter an email address.";s:11:"invalid_url";s:19:"Please enter a URL.";s:11:"invalid_tel";s:32:"Please enter a telephone number.";}

a:1:{s:23:"mail.additional_headers";a:1:{i:0;a:2:{s:4:"code";s:22:"invalid_mailbox_syntax";s:4:"args";a:3:{s:7:"message";s:51:"Invalid mailbox syntax is used in the %name% field.";s:6:"params";a:1:{s:4:"name";s:8:"Reply-To";}s:4:"link";s:68:"https://contactform7.com/configuration-errors/invalid-mailbox-syntax";}}}}

item.title: Mikit CL80 Lavanderry Purple
item.dc:creator: Mr. Mackay
item.content:encoded:
Reloaded. Rewired. Reinvented.

Sep 5th 2021 marks the date when the low-profile mechanical keyboard was forever changed by the release of NuPhy Air75. Fast forward 2 years, we are excited to share that a new Air75 with lightning fast connection and light weight, one not just built for you, but also put you in charge, is now ready.

New Arrivals

Bask in the fresh Air ‘Less is more’ has been our mantra when it comes to designing

Keycaps

A double-shot keycap
at half the thickness Double-shot PBT keycaps are finally coming to Air75!

item.title: TX Switch Puller
item.dc:creator: Mr. Mackay
item.content:encoded:
Reloaded. Rewired. Reinvented.

Sep 5th 2021 marks the date when the low-profile mechanical keyboard was forever changed by the release of NuPhy Air75. Fast forward 2 years, we are excited to share that a new Air75 with lightning fast connection and light weight, one not just built for you, but also put you in charge, is now ready.

New Arrivals

Bask in the fresh Air ‘Less is more’ has been our mantra when it comes to designing

Keycaps

A double-shot keycap
at half the thickness Double-shot PBT keycaps are finally coming to Air75!

item.title: Contact form 1
item.dc:creator: Mr. Mackay
item.content:encoded:
<label> Your name [text* your-name autocomplete:name] </label>
<label> Your email [email* your-email autocomplete:email] </label>
<label> Subject [text* your-subject] </label>
<label> Your message (optional) [textarea your-message] </label>
[submit "Submit"] [_site_title] "[your-subject]" [_site_title] <wordpress@dummy.xtemos.com> From: [your-name] [your-email] Subject: [your-subject]
Message Body: [your-message]
-- This is a notification that a contact form was submitted on your website ([_site_title] [_site_url]). [_site_admin_email] Reply-To: [your-email]
0 0
[_site_title] "[your-subject]" [_site_title] <wordpress@dummy.xtemos.com> Message Body: [your-message]
-- This email is a receipt for your contact form submission on our website ([_site_title] [_site_url]) in which your email address was used. If that was not you, please ignore this message. [your-email] Reply-To: [_site_admin_email]
0 0 Thank you for your message. It has been sent. There was an error trying to send your message. Please try again later. One or more fields have an error. Please check and try again. There was an error trying to send your message. Please try again later. You must accept the terms and conditions before sending your message. Please fill out this field. This field has a too long input. This field has a too short input. There was an unknown error uploading the file. You are not allowed to upload files of this type. The uploaded file is too large. There was an error uploading the file.

wp:postmeta.wp:meta_value:
<label> Your name [text* your-name autocomplete:name] </label>
<label> Your email [email* your-email autocomplete:email] </label>
<label> Subject [text* your-subject] </label>
<label> Your message (optional) [textarea your-message] </label>
[submit "Submit"]

a:9:{s:6:"active";b:0;s:7:"subject";s:30:"[_site_title] "[your-subject]"";s:6:"sender";s:42:"[_site_title] <wordpress@dummy.xtemos.com>";s:4:"body";s:220:"Message Body: [your-message]
-- This email is a receipt for your contact form submission on our website ([_site_title] [_site_url]) in which your email address was used. If that was not you, please ignore this message.";s:9:"recipient";s:12:"[your-email]";s:18:"additional_headers";s:29:"Reply-To: [_site_admin_email]";s:11:"attachments";s:0:"";s:8:"use_html";i:0;s:13:"exclude_blank";i:0;}

a:12:{s:12:"mail_sent_ok";s:45:"Thank you for your message. It has been sent.";s:12:"mail_sent_ng";s:71:"There was an error trying to send your message. Please try again later.";s:16:"validation_error";s:61:"One or more fields have an error. Please check and try again.";s:4:"spam";s:71:"There was an error trying to send your message. Please try again later.";s:12:"accept_terms";s:69:"You must accept the terms and conditions before sending your message.";s:16:"invalid_required";s:27:"Please fill out this field.";s:16:"invalid_too_long";s:32:"This field has a too long input.";s:17:"invalid_too_short";s:33:"This field has a too short input.";s:13:"upload_failed";s:46:"There was an unknown error uploading the file.";s:24:"upload_file_type_invalid";s:49:"You are not allowed to upload files of this type.";s:21:"upload_file_too_large";s:31:"The uploaded file is too large.";s:23:"upload_failed_php_error";s:38:"There was an error uploading the file.";}

item.title: NuPhy Gem80
item.dc:creator: Mr. Mackay
item.content:encoded:
Reloaded. Rewired. Reinvented.

Sep 5th 2021 marks the date when the low-profile mechanical keyboard was forever changed by the release of NuPhy Air75. Fast forward 2 years, we are excited to share that a new Air75 with lightning fast connection and light weight, one not just built for you, but also put you in charge, is now ready.

New Arrivals

Bask in the fresh Air ‘Less is more’ has been our mantra when it comes to designing

Keycaps

A double-shot keycap
at half the thickness Double-shot PBT keycaps are finally coming to Air75!
